DEFENDANTS CURTIS GUILLORY, WARMAN SECURITY, ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR'S MOTION TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF JUDICIAL ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION ENFORCEMENT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SCHEDULED ON 5/27/2009 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL OF 9/21/2009 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. MINI MINUTES: Defendants Curtis Guillory, Warman Security, Enterprise Rent-A-Car's Motion to Mediate in lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause scheduled on 5/27/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial of 9/21/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206.
